title: Multibody Dynamics with Constraints
source_data_quality_note: Source MD is a widefield-fluorescence fan-out artifact; principle grounded in domain literature.

E.description: Multibody Dynamics with Constraints: Multibody dynamics with holonomic constraints: simulate articulated mechanism using Lagrange multipliers. The forward operator produces the measurement through a 3-node primitive DAG (M.lagrange.multiplier_dynamics…); recovery is posed as a parameter_estimation problem. Difficulty tier delta=5 with effective condition number kappa_eff~500; constraint_drift_accumulation, index_reduction_error set the accuracy floor at the Omega boundary. See the forward_model field for the closed-form equation.
E.forward_model: [M, -J ** T; J, 0] [q_ddot; lambda] = [Q; b]; constraint stabilization: Baumgarte method
E.world_state_x: generalized accelerations q_ddot and constraint forces lambda
E.observation_y: generalized forces Q(t) and current state {q, q_dot}

W.regime: Existence of the recovered generalized_acceleration_vector is guaranteed within the declared Omega bounds. Uniqueness holds on the measurement-supported subspace; out-of-support modes are controlled by declared priors. Stability is conditionally stable (kappa_eff ~= 500); constraint_drift_accumulation dominates the stability cliff; the remaining mismatch parameters contribute higher-order bias terms. Deterministic sets the irreducible data-fidelity floor.

C.error_bound: Data-fidelity bound: constraint violation < 1e-6 m with Baumgarte stabilization. Noise floor: O(sigma / sqrt(kappa_eff)) with kappa_eff~500. Mismatch-induced bias + C2 * |constraint_drift_accumulation|; iterative solvers achieve q=2 convergence (O(1/k^2)) near the optimum; epsilon_fn captures quality degradation across declared Omega.
C.complexity: O((n+m) ** 3) for KKT system inversion, n generalized coords, m constraints per iteration
